description_long: This cabinetry object consists of two main components: a tall, rectangular storage unit with a hinged door and a lower, wider unit with open shelving and a flat top surface. The tall unit features multiple internal shelves, visible when the door is open, and is designed for vertical storage. The lower unit appears to be a bench or media console, with two open shelves and a solid top that can support other objects. Both pieces have a minimalist, modern design with clean lines and a uniform, light gray finish. The cabinetry is constructed from what appears to be wood or a wood composite, with no visible decorative hardware except for the door hinges. The overall look is functional and suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or garages.
description: A modern, two-piece cabinetry set featuring a tall storage unit with a hinged door and a low, open-shelf bench or console, both in a light gray finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the tall cabinet and the edge of the lower bench unit.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open shelving of the bench and the closed face of the tall cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back panels of both units and the alignment of their forms.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the open door of the tall cabinet and the shelving inside, as well as the full length of the bench.
